## Skill name

Which skill is affected? (e.g., `marlin-compact`, `intent-parser`)

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the output you received.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Use mode: `...`
2. Input prompt: `...`
3. Expected output: `...`
4. Actual output: `...`

## Mode used

- [ ] structured
- [ ] compact
- [ ] dense
- [ ] domain (specify: web-api / data-pipeline / agent-task)
- [ ] dsl

## Agent platform

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Gemini CLI
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] Antigravity

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
